docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $60.00 FILED BY TIMMONS,CALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT TOM'S GROCERY & DELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIMMONS,CALVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOM'S GROCERY & DELI $60.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60.00, PLTF IS ORDERED TO STAY OUT OF AND AWAY FROM DEFT'S STORE OR ANNOY DEFENDANTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO CALVIN TIMMONS RETURNED, WRONG ADDRESS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOM'S GROCERY & DELI
